name: Watcher
firstNightReminder: As long as you're alive, no more than one player can die at night.
ability: As long as you're alive, no more than one player can die at night.

name: Airship Navigator
firstNightReminder: Once per game, you can reverse the order of roles that are scheduled to awaken at night. This only lasts for one night.
ability: You start knowing that 1 of 2 players is a particular Outsider. (Or that zero are in play.)

name: Herald
firstNightReminder: If your nomination beats the previous one in votes, you learn whether the evil player was executed.
ability: If your nomination beats the previous one in votes, you learn whether the evil player was executed.

name: Spotlighter
firstNightReminder: Every night, you choose a player: they cannot be poisoned that night.
ability: Every night, you choose a player: they cannot be poisoned that night.

name: Weaver
firstNightReminder: Once per game: at night, choose two players: if one dies, so does the other
otherNightReminder: Once per game: at night, choose two players: if one dies, so does the other.
ability: Once per game: at night, choose two players: if one dies, so does the other.

name: Scanner
firstNightReminder: If you were nominated but not executed, you learn the nominator's side that night.
ability: If you were nominated but not executed, you learn the nominator's side that night.

name: pathfinder
otherNightReminder: Every night, you learn which player is NOT a demon.
ability: Every night, you learn which player is NOT a demon.

name: Lady
otherNightReminder: Every night*. Choose a player. If they are poisoned or killed, the effect will be passed on to you.
ability: Every night*. Choose a player. If they are poisoned or killed, the effect will be passed on to you.

name: Witness
otherNightReminder: If you are chosen to be killed at night, you will recognize two players, one of whom is your killer.
ability: If you are chosen to be killed at night, you will recognize two players, one of whom is your killer.

name: Guest
ability: At the start of the game: find out if your neighbors woke up today.

name: Inquisitor
ability: Once per game. At any time, publicly choose a player. If this player is a citizen, their execution will be cancelled.

name: Lab Assistant
ability: At the start of the game. Choose two players → find out if they are on the same team.

name: Prophet
ability: *Every night. You know who the demon has chosen to kill at night. If you correctly guess this player's role, they will live.

name: Broken
firstNightReminder: One of your closest neighboring townspeople doesn't wake up for the entire game until you die.
otherNightReminder: One of your closest neighboring townspeople doesn't wake up for the entire game until you die.
ability: One of your closest neighboring townspeople doesn't wake up for the entire game until you die.

name: Stuck
ability: You must vote in all nominations, even after death.

name: Possessed
ability: Every night. Choose a player—they are your obsession. After their death, choose a player. If the chosen player is blue, they will die that night; if red, you will die.

name: Discharged
ability: While you're alive, the random ability doesn't trigger each night. When you die, all abilities trigger correctly the following night.

name: Shadow
firstNightReminder: Once per game: The player's death is hidden until the next day.
otherNightReminder: Once per game: The player's death is hidden until the next day.
ability: Once per game: The player's death is hidden until the next day.

name: Saboteur
firstNightReminder: Each night, you choose a role: if it's in the game, it will be poisoned until sunset.
otherNightReminder: Each night, you choose a role: if it's in the game, it will be poisoned until sunset.
ability: Each night, you choose a role: if it's in the game, it will be poisoned until sunset.

name: Succubus
otherNightReminder: +1/2 Outsider. You know the outcast roles you added to the game. If a demon kills them, you deprive them of their last voice.
ability: +1/2 Outsider. You know the outcast roles you added to the game. If a demon kills them, you deprive them of their last voice.

name: Baron
ability: There are extra Outsiders in play. [+2 Outsiders]

name: Pressure Eater
otherNightReminder: Each night*, choose a player to die tonight. If no one is executed during the day, choose two players.
ability: Each night*, choose a player to die tonight. If no one is executed during the day, choose two players.
